mapper.select: SELECT count(*) cnt FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1

SELECT STD_AREA_NM as stdAreaNm, DIC_PHY_NM as dicPhyNm, DIC_LOG_NM as dicLogNm, DATA_TYPE_NM as dataTypeNm, DATA_TYPE_CD as dataTypeCd, DATA_LEN as dataLen, DATA_SCALE as dataScale, DIC_DESC as dicDesc FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1 AND std_area_id in (#{tobeAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},#{appAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR})

SELECT STD_AREA_NM as stdAreaNm, DIC_PHY_NM as dicPhyNm, DIC_LOG_NM as dicLogNm, DATA_TYPE_NM as dataTypeNm, DATA_TYPE_CD as dataTypeCd, DATA_LEN as dataLen, DATA_SCALE as dataScale, DIC_DESC as dicDesc FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1 AND std_area_id = #{tobeAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND AVAL_ST_DT > to_char(sysdate-3/24, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT STD_AREA_NM as stdAreaNm, DIC_PHY_NM as dicPhyNm, DIC_LOG_NM as dicLogNm, DATA_TYPE_NM as dataTypeNm, DATA_TYPE_CD as dataTypeCd, DATA_LEN as dataLen, DATA_SCALE as dataScale, DIC_DESC as dicDesc FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1 AND std_area_id = #{tobeAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

SELECT STD_AREA_NM as stdAreaNm, DIC_PHY_NM as dicPhyNm, DIC_LOG_NM as dicLogNm, DATA_TYPE_NM as dataTypeNm, DATA_TYPE_CD as dataTypeCd, DATA_LEN as dataLen, DATA_SCALE as dataScale, DIC_DESC as dicDesc FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1 AND std_area_id = #{appAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND NEW_DIC_PHY_NM != DIC_PHY_NM AND AVAL_ST_DT > to_char(sysdate-3/24, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT STD_AREA_NM as stdAreaNm, DIC_PHY_NM as dicPhyNm, DIC_LOG_NM as dicLogNm, DATA_TYPE_NM as dataTypeNm, DATA_TYPE_CD as dataTypeCd, DATA_LEN as dataLen, DATA_SCALE as dataScale, DIC_DESC as dicDesc FROM DAWARE.DA#V_TERM_2 WHERE 1=1 AND std_area_id = #{appAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND NEW_DIC_PHY_NM != DIC_PHY_NM

select CD_VAL as cdVal, CD_VAL_NM as cdValNm, P_CD_ID as pCdId, P_CD_VAL_ID as pCdValId, CD_VAL_ID as cdValId from DAWARE.V_STD_CD_VAL_2 where std_area_id=#{stdAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and P_CD_VAL_ID = #{pCdValId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
select CD_VAL as cdVal, CD_VAL_NM as cdValNm, CD_VAL_DESC as cdValDesc from DAWARE.V_STD_CD_VAL_2 where std_area_id=#{stdAreaId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and cd_id=#{cdId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
